input_text: In production, the checkout submit button fails in Chrome after valid card details are entered. Severity high. Expected payment submission, actual error banner. Status triaged.
The search results page in staging shows a blank state after applying filters. Medium severity. Expected filtered results, actual empty panel. Status new.
On the development environment, profile image upload returns a 400 error. Low severity. Expected upload success, actual validation error. Status new.
Production authentication modal loops after MFA approval in Edge. Critical severity because users cannot sign in. Status triaged.
In test, reports export downloads a zero byte CSV after selecting date range. Medium severity. Expected populated CSV, actual empty file. Status in progress.
Production inventory page shows negative stock values in Firefox on Windows. High severity. Expected non-negative inventory counts, actual negative counts. Status triaged.
Staging notifications settings page does not save email preference changes in Safari. Low severity. Expected preferences saved, actual settings revert. Status new.
Production admin billing page crashes on invoice search. Critical severity. Expected search results, actual page crash. Status in progress.
Development audit log filter ignores the selected model field. Low severity. Expected filtered logs, actual unfiltered logs. Status fixed.
Test environment schema editor accepts invalid enum syntax. Medium severity. Expected validation error, actual schema saved. Status triaged.
